assertions.reason: --help listed all required flags and omitting --problem returned non-zero with an explicit missing argument error.
Single-problem run exited 1 with 'no checkpoints found' and produced no output directory; eval could not run against a nonexistent run path.
Could not reach any checkpoint execution phase because runner exited early with 'no checkpoints found'; telemetry file was never created.
Per-checkpoint metrics could not be validated because two_agent_metrics.json was not produced after early 'no checkpoints found' termination.
Low-budget run failed before budget enforcement logic due 'no checkpoints found'; budget-cap abort path and partial-save behavior were not reachable.
Invalid model name was rejected immediately with a clear unknown-model error and no scbench-* Docker containers were present before or after.

Out-of-range splits (0, 100, -5) were rejected with explicit range errors and non-integer abc was rejected by CLI parsing; in-range values (1, 99) passed split validation and failed later at model validation instead.

commandsRun.command:
python3 - <<'INNER'
import json
from pathlib import Path
path=Path("/tmp/scbench-user-testing/runner-core-basic/val-runner-003/two_agent_metrics.json")
if not path.exists():
    print("MISSING_METRICS_FILE")
    raise SystemExit(1)
obj=json.loads(path.read_text())
required=["pass_rate","erosion","verbosity","tokens_implementer","tokens_reviewer","cost"]
missing=[]
for cp, vals in obj.get("checkpoints", {}).items():
    miss=[k for k in required if k not in vals]
    print(cp, sorted(vals.keys()))
    if miss:
        missing.append((cp, miss))
print("missing", missing)
INNER

frictions.description: Runner checks for checkpoint_* directories, but current problems are organized without checkpoint subdirectories, which prevents execution from reaching any checkpoint phase.

blockers.description: Happy-path execution is blocked by early checkpoint discovery failure ('no checkpoints found'), so downstream budget-split telemetry and metrics assertions cannot be exercised through CLI flow.
